channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Advertising Board Rules Some Dettol Soap Claims Misleading
item.description: The Advertising Regulatory Board (ARB) has investigated claims made on certain Dettol bar soaps after a complaint from competitor Colgate-Palmolive, who argued that the advertising was misleading. The...

item.title: Vice-Admiral Angus Topshee Appointed as Vice Chief of Defence Staff
item.description: Vice-Admiral Angus Topshee, known for his candid approach as head of the Royal Canadian Navy, has been appointed as the Vice Chief of Defence Staff, taking over from Stephen Kelsey, who is retiring af...

item.title: Civil Society to Protest Over Alleged Missing N26.9 Billion From USPF Under Tinubu
item.description: Na coalition of civil society organisations don announce say dem go hold one big protest for Abuja on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, over N26.9 billion wey dem talk say don disappear from the Universal Servic...

item.title: Trump asserts certain nations should not possess nuclear weapons
item.description: On May 13, 2026, President Donald Trump addressed questions from the media regarding international security and the ongoing war efforts. When asked whether Americans’ financial situation was influenci...

item.title: Michael Voss confirms resignation from Carlton Football Club
item.description: Michael Voss has announced that he will step down from his role as head coach of the Carlton Football Club. This decision marks the end of his tenure with the team, which has experienced various chall...

item.title: Congress Nears Decision on Kerala Chief Minister After UDF Victory
item.description: After a week of uncertainty, the Congress party appears close to resolving the deadlock over the new Chief Minister of Kerala following the United Democratic Front's (UDF) decisive win in the state as...

item.title: Nollywood mourns Alexx Ekubo, actor dies at 40 after private battle with cancer
item.description: The Nigerian entertainment industry don enter deep mourning as Nollywood actor Alexx Ekubo don pass away at age 40 after quietly battling cancer. Many colleagues, fans and public figures express shock...

item.title: Karnataka Revises Reservation Quotas to Comply with Supreme Court Limit
item.description: The Karnataka government has recently announced the commencement of public recruitment for 56,432 posts, one of the largest in the State in recent years, following prolonged delays due to reservation-...

item.title: Tinubu Urges Africa to Industrialise and Strengthen Maritime Economy
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don speak say Africa need to dey process im own resources make e fit compete for global market. During the Africa Forward Summit for Nairobi, Tinubu yarn say Nigeria get be...

item.title: Keir Starmer Meets Health Secretary Amid Labour Party Leadership Turmoil
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer is set to meet Health Secretary Wes Streeting on Wednesday, as Labour faces internal pressure over its leadership. The meeting comes after four ministers resigned, incl...

item.title: SA Unemployment Rate Inches Up to 32.7% in Q1 2026
item.description: Statistics South Africa (Stats SA) has reported a marginal increase in the country's official unemployment rate, rising by 1.3 percentage points from 31.4% in Q4 2025 to 32.7% in Q1 2026. The Quarterl...

item.title: Islamabad Lawyers Concerned Over JCP Decision Affecting High Court Appointments
item.description: The Judicial Commission of Pakistan (JCP) recently decided not to fill vacancies in the Islamabad High Court (IHC) after transferring three of its judges to other provincial high courts. This move has...

item.title: PM Modi reduces convoy size and encourages austerity measures across government departments
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has taken a notable step towards promoting austerity within government operations by instructing the Special Protection Group (SPG) to reduce the size of his official conv...

item.title: Rajasthan Police Traces NEET Paper Leak Circulated on WhatsApp
item.description: In a major development surrounding NEET-UG 2026, a handwritten 'guess paper' containing 120 questions identical to the actual exam went viral on WhatsApp, prompting authorities to cancel the medical a...

item.title: Favour Ashe Disqualified, Nigerian Women Shine at Accra 2026 Athletics
item.description: For the ongoing Accra 2026 African Senior Athletics Championships wey dey Ghana, Nigeria don face small wahala but also show promise. One of our medal hopes for the men’s 100m, Favour Ashe, comot for ...

item.title: Trump says U.S. economic concerns do not influence his Iran policy, drawing criticism
item.description: On May 12, 2026, President Donald Trump made a statement outside the White House regarding U.S. negotiations to end the war in Iran. Trump asserted that the financial struggles Americans face do not i...

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham Expresses Frustration Over Pakistan’s Role in Iran Conflict
item.description: During a Senate hearing on Tuesday regarding the ongoing conflict in Iran, Senator Lindsey Graham (R-S.C.) expressed visible frustration with military officials and questioned Pakistan’s role as a neu...

item.title: Plateau Governor Outlines Plan to Tackle Security Challenges
item.description: Governor Caleb Mutfwang of Plateau State don talk say him administration dey serious to solve the security wahala wey don dey happen for the state. Na during one visit by students from the Senior Cour...

item.title: Kenya and France push for UN reforms and fair representation for Africa
item.description: President William Ruto of Kenya and French President Emmanuel Macron have jointly called for sweeping reforms at the United Nations to make the organisation more democratic, inclusive and fit for toda...

item.title: Orlando Pirates’ Consistency Puts Them on Track for Premiership Glory
item.description: Orlando Pirates have emerged as strong contenders for the Betway Premiership, potentially completing a domestic treble for the first time since the 2011/12 season. Central to their success is the stra...
